---
title: "About"
description: "Vahhab Piranfar is a molecular microbiologist and computational researcher focused on antimicrobial resistance, bacterial modeling, antibiotic PK/PD, antimicrobial pharmacometrics, and reproducible research."
keywords: "antimicrobial resistance, bacterial modeling, antibiotic PK/PD, antimicrobial pharmacometrics, Monte Carlo simulation, virtual populations, clinical microbiology, reproducible research"
---

## Professional Profile

I am a researcher specializing in **medical and clinical microbiology**, **antimicrobial resistance**, and **antibiotic PK/PD modeling**. Based in **Jersey City, New Jersey**, I combine clinical laboratory experience with bacterial-response modeling and computational evidence synthesis to study how bacterial pathogens, antibiotic exposure, and resistance interact. My work is supported by a foundation in **molecular biology** and **bioinformatics**, which I apply to translational research that connects the bench with reproducible, data-driven models.

::: {.info-card}
### Vision Statement
> "In the modern era of microbiology, the microscope is no longer our only lens. By integrating computational data analysis with molecular techniques, we can decode pathogen behavior at a scale that was previously unimaginable."
>
> — **Vahhab Piranfar**
:::

## Research Interests

- **Antimicrobial resistance and bacterial adaptation** — mechanisms of resistance and adaptation across clinical pathogens.
- **Antibiotic PK/PD and pharmacometric simulation** — modeling antibiotic exposure, target attainment, and treatment response.
- **Bacterial growth, killing, persistence, and resistance modeling** — quantitative description of bacterial dynamics under drug pressure.
- **Molecular diagnostics and pathogen genomics** — resistance mechanisms in *Brucella*, *Pseudomonas*, and *Staphylococcus*.
- **Reproducible evidence-composite modeling** — provenance-aware synthesis of fragmented evidence into simulation-ready components.

## Professional Journey

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Experience

**CEO · Farname Inc.**
*January 2018 – Present*
Directing strategy, scientific collaboration, and research-focused initiatives at the intersection of technology and life sciences.

---

**Laboratory Technician · Imam Khomeini Hospital**
*2019 – 2024*
Performed high-volume diagnostic testing, including MALDI-TOF, microbial identification, and clinical reporting.

### Education

**M.S. in Microbiology**
*Islamic Azad University · 2015*
Thesis focused on nanoparticle-based antimicrobial strategies and their efficacy against resistant clinical isolates.

### Strengths

- Over a decade of laboratory experience in clinical and research microbiology.
- Scientific communication and editorial experience across peer-reviewed international journals.
- Co-inventor of a diagnostic assay for rapid *Brucella* detection from human blood.
- EB-1A recognized expertise in molecular diagnostics and pathogen genomics.
:::

## Technical Skills

**Molecular Assays**

<div class="skills-grid">
<span class="skill-pill">PCR</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Real-time PCR</span>
<span class="skill-pill">HRM Genotyping</span>
<span class="skill-pill">RFLP</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Multiplex PCR</span>
<span class="skill-pill">MALDI-TOF</span>
<span class="skill-pill">ELISA</span>
</div>

**Modeling & Simulation**

<div class="skills-grid">
<span class="skill-pill">Monte Carlo Simulation</span>
<span class="skill-pill">PK/PD Modeling</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Pharmacometric Modeling</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Virtual Population Generation</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Sensitivity Analysis</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Provenance-Aware Data Modeling</span>
</div>

**Computational Tools**

<div class="skills-grid">
<span class="skill-pill">GROMACS</span>
<span class="skill-pill">VMD</span>
<span class="skill-pill">CLC Genomics Workbench</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Molecular Dynamics</span>
</div>

**Data Analysis & Programming**

<div class="skills-grid">
<span class="skill-pill">Scientific Python</span>
<span class="skill-pill">SPSS</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Data Visualization</span>
<span class="skill-pill">Bioinformatics Pipelines</span>
</div>

## Selected Publications

- **Piranfar V.** (2025). Comparative modeling of antibiotic resistance in *Mycobacterium tuberculosis*. *bioRxiv*.
- **Mirnejad R, Piranfar V, et al.** (2013). A duplex PCR for rapid detection of *Brucella* in human blood. *Asian Pacific Journal of Tropical Medicine*.
- **Book**: *Metal Nanoparticles in Microbiology* (Persian). ISBN: 978-964-504-228-8.
